'''waruzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seaberry|seaberry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-r-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seaberry|seaberry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| waruzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wærizith|wærizith]] || [[word:wærizij|wærizij]] || [[word:wærizish|wærizish]] || [[word:wærizi|wærizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:waruruzuth|waruruzuth]] || [[word:waruruzuj|waruruzuj]] || [[word:waruruzush|waruruzush]] || [[word:waruruzu|waruruzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:waruzuth|waruzuth]] || [[word:waruzuj|waruzuj]] || [[word:waruzush|waruzush]] || [[word:waruzu|waruzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:warufzuth|warufzuth]] || [[word:warufzuj|warufzuj]] || [[word:warufzush|warufzush]] || [[word:warufzuf|warufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:waruzuthu|waruzuthu]] || [[word:waruzuju|waruzuju]] || [[word:waruzushu|waruzushu]] || [[word:waruzuku|waruzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:waruzuth|waruzuth]] || [[word:waruzuj|waruzuj]] || [[word:waruzush|waruzush]] || [[word:waruzu|waruzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:waruzuthul|waruzuthul]] || [[word:waruzujul|waruzujul]] || [[word:waruzushul|waruzushul]] || [[word:waruzukul|waruzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:waruzuthuthu|waruzuthuthu]] || [[word:waruzujuju|waruzujuju]] || [[word:waruzushushu|waruzushushu]] || [[word:waruzuku|waruzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:waruzuthun|waruzuthun]] || [[word:waruzujun|waruzujun]] || [[word:waruzushun|waruzushun]] || [[word:waruzukun|waruzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:waruzuthuoro|waruzuthuoro]] || [[word:waruzujuoro|waruzujuoro]] || [[word:waruzushuoro|waruzushuoro]] || [[word:waruzukuoro|waruzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
